title: Choice Action Request
description: Harness-neutral bounded choice/action request. Each choice describes a selectable decision with stable semantics, aliases, and fallback text so any harness can render it interactively or as a text prompt.

requestId.description: Stable id for the decision prompt instance.

title.description: Short user-facing title for the decision.

body.description: Optional explanatory text shown with the choices.

choices.description: Ordered set of selectable choices. Choice ids and aliases must be unique within the request.

fallbackPrompt.description: Text prompt representation for non-interactive surfaces.

defaultChoiceId.description: Optional default choice id for timeout or explicit default behaviour.

allowTextAliases.description: Whether numeric and short text aliases may be accepted as input.

allowDisabledOverride.description: Whether a disabled choice may be selected despite its disabled state.

id.description: Stable choice id unique within the request.

label.description: Visible label shown to the user.

canonicalValue.description: Machine-readable value persisted by the consumer.

aliases.description: Accepted numeric and short text input aliases.

description.description: Optional supporting text shown with the choice.

disabled.description: Whether the choice is currently unavailable.
